text: Refunds. Domestic orders are refundable within 30 days of purchase. To request a refund, open Billing > Orders, select the order, and click Request Refund. Approved refunds return to the original payment method within 5 business days.

International orders are non-refundable after 14 days. Customs and import fees are never refundable. This 14-day window is shorter than the 30-day domestic window, so check your order's region before requesting.

Cancel a subscription. Go to Settings > Subscription and click Cancel Plan. Your plan stays active until the end of the current billing period; you are not charged again after that. Canceling does not delete your account or your data.

Upgrade a subscription. Go to Settings > Subscription and click Change Plan, then choose a higher tier. Upgrades take effect immediately and are prorated for the remainder of the current billing period. Downgrades apply at the next renewal.

Error ERR_QUOTA_42 means your account exceeded its monthly API request quota. The default quota is 100000 requests per month on the Pro plan. Resolve it by upgrading your plan or waiting for the quota to reset on the first of the month. Retrying immediately will not help.

The API rate limit is 100 requests per minute per key. Exceeding it returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header. Back off and retry after the indicated number of seconds. The per-minute rate limit is separate from the monthly quota described under ERR_QUOTA_42.

SKU WIDGET-PRO-128 is the 128-channel Widget Pro controller. It ships with a 3-year warranty and supports firmware over-the-air updates. It supersedes the discontinued WIDGET-PRO-64. Bulk pricing applies at 50 units.

Incident response. If you suspect a credential leak, rotate the affected API keys immediately from the admin console, revoke active sessions, and file a SEV2 ticket. This runbook is restricted to the security team and must not be shared with customers.
